fresh_call_design.requirement: all three repetitions are fresh requests; do not treat the historical 7290 matrix as repetition 1

release_note: The generated-item table is privacy-minimized in the review release; the restricted-source hash is retained separately from the released-file hash.

selection_rule.allocation: two 9-cell rounds per domain; every generator appears once per round; task assignment uses (generator_index + round_index) mod 3; within-task assignment uses SHA256-derived rotation
constraints_satisfied: each generator x domain cell = 2 items
each generator x task cell = 3 or 4 items
three distinct selected generators within every concept
selection_rule.eligible_population: complete 30 concept x 3 task x 9 generator crossing
selection_rule.historical_outcomes_not_used: fa/cc/lc/tf/mq/risk were not read for selection; historical matrix was used only to verify keys, judge coverage, score completeness/range, and input-integrity flags
